With this launch, you can create IAM policies that restrict users to specific operati

articles.title: Windows 11 Out‑of‑Band Update Fixes Microsoft Account Sign‑In Issues
articles.snippet: Microsoft has rolled out an out-of-band update to fix account sign-in issues in Windows 11 triggered by the March 2026 update. The emergency patch (KB5085516) is now available for devices running Windows 11 versions 24H2 and 25H2. According to Microsoft, users have reported that the March security u

articles.title: How to Create and Access Shared Folders in Windows 11 (Step‑By‑Step)
articles.snippet: Windows file sharing allows any Windows PC to host a file share, making files available to other computers on the same network. articles.title: Microsoft Makes External MFA Generally Available in Microsoft Entra ID
articles.snippet: Microsoft has made external multi-factor authentication (MFA) generally available in Microsoft Entra ID. The update enables organizations to seamlessly integrate third-party MFA providers into their authentication workflows without losing centralized control. Previously, organizations using Microsof

articles.title: FCC Bans Foreign‑Manufactured Consumer Routers Over Security Risks
articles.snippet: The Federal Communications Commission (FCC) has imposed a ban on certain foreign-made consumer routers entering the United States, citing rising cybersecurity concerns. articles.title: Microsoft Defender Enhances Identity Security with AI-Driven Threat Detection and Response
articles.snippet: As cyberattacks grow faster and more identity‑driven, Microsoft is enhancing how organizations defend their digital environments.
